notes:
v1.9.5 Update
🔧 Default Spell Preset Fixed: The fallback cut-in for spells was not firing at all — now works correctly across DnD5e, PF2e, PF1e, and with Midi-QOL.
🔧 Spell Use / Template Triggers Fixed: Per-item On Use triggers and template placement triggers were silently failing.

announcement.title: 🎬 Cinematic Cut-ins v1.9.5
announcement.content:
v1.9.5 — Spell Trigger Fix

  • 🔧 Default Spell Preset: The fallback cut-in for spells was not firing at all. Now works correctly across all supported systems and with Midi-QOL.
  • 🔧 Item Triggers: Per-item On Use triggers and template placement triggers (e.g. Fireball area) were silently failing. Fixed.
